terms.services: Monthly release engineering review and incident-readiness support

send.objective: Execute send-as planning and deterministic mock provider delivery for a review draft generated from an external public MSA template.
send.consent_basis: Public maintainer review of a nonbinding synthetic contract draft produced from a public template.
send.operator_context: Contract-drafter may execute only the deterministic mock review-queue transport; no live external send is authorized.
send.subject_or_title: Review the externally sourced services agreement draft
